commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: For it began, or its beginning was

commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: To Him give all the prophets witness, that, through His name, every one that believeth in Him does receive remission of sins."

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: First he speaks of His success, and then again he says concerning Him, Jesus of Nazareth. Why, what a stumbling-block, this birthplace! How God anointed Him with the Holy Ghost and with power.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: even Jesus of Nazareth, how God anointed Him with the Holy Ghost and with power.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
